calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Judgment Entered

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-02-2007 Continued To Sep-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal on 3 related cases: 028390, 028392 & 028393. Eric Lewis appears on behalf of Nick Paulos, in Pro Per; Brian Kelly, Esq appears on behalf of Respondent, City of Berkeley, Rent Stabilization Board. (Assisting him was Alberto Delagadrro.)

Mr. Lewis represents to the Court that Mr. Paulos has been hospitalized and he requests a continuance. Mr. Kelly has no objections after having Mr. Lewis swear under oath that his representations were true. (Mr. Lewis informs the Court that Mr. Paulos is in John Muir Medical Center in Walnut Creek.)

9:20am
Finding good cause the matter is continued to Sep-06-07, 9am. Per order, the three matters are consolidated per order. The parties sign 3 stipulations to allow Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles to hear the continued cases. Mr. Paulos ordered present, either in person, or through counsel or another person qualified to represent his interests.
